Package org.mlflow.api.proto

Interface Service.DeleteDatasetRecordsOrBuilder

  • All Superinterfaces:
    com.google.protobuf.MessageLiteOrBuilder, com.google.protobuf.MessageOrBuilder
    All Known Implementing Classes:
    Service.DeleteDatasetRecords, Service.DeleteDatasetRecords.Builder

    public static interface Service.DeleteDatasetRecordsOrBuilder
extends com.google.protobuf.MessageOrBuilder

      • hasDatasetId

        boolean hasDatasetId()
         Dataset ID to delete records from.
        optional string dataset_id = 1 [(.mlflow.validate_required) = true];
        Returns:
        Whether the datasetId field is set.

         Dataset ID to delete records from.
        optional string dataset_id = 1 [(.mlflow.validate_required) = true];

        java.util.List<java.lang.String> getDatasetRecordIdsList()
         List of dataset record IDs to delete.
        repeated string dataset_record_ids = 2;

        A list containing the datasetRecordIds.

         List of dataset record IDs to delete.
